heading: Residency training programs in emergency medicine
label: 300d–51 Residency training programs in emergency medicine
notes: Amendments2007— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to residency training programs in emergency medicine and authorized appropriations for fiscal years 1993 through 1995.Pub. L. 110–23
amendments: Amendments2007— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to residency training programs in emergency medicine and authorized appropriations for fiscal years 1993 through 1995.Pub. L. 110–23

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may make grants to public and nonprofit private entities for the purpose of planning and developing approved residency training programs in emergency medicine.

children.heading: Identification and referral of domestic violence
children.label: b Identification and referral of domestic violence
children.text: The Secretary may make a grant under subsection (a) only if the applicant involved agrees that the training programs under subsection (a) will provide education and training in identifying and referring cases of domestic violence.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out this section, there is authorized to be appropriated $400,000 for each of the fiscal years 2008 though 2012.
